slots: Sacred shrine, spiritual atmosphere, Sai Baba legacy
Begin your pilgrimage at the heart of Shirdi, where devotees from around the world gather to seek blessings at the resting place of Sai Baba.
Historic mosque, sacred dhuni, spiritual significance
Visit the place where Sai Baba spent much of his life, offering guidance and compassion to devotees. Experience the enduring flame that continues to burn to this day.
Participate in the soul-stirring evening aarti and immerse yourself in the devotion and faith that define Shirdi's unique spiritual character.
